records.ety: [F. aphorisme, fr. Gr. <?/ definition, a short, pithy sentence, fr. <?/ to mark off by boundaries, to define; <?/ from + <?/ to separate, part. See Horizon.]

defs: A comprehensive maxim or principle expressed in a few words; a sharply defined sentence relating to abstract truth rather than to practical matters.
quotes: The first aphorism of Hippocrates is, “Life is short, and the art is long.”
